Package com.example.vigilante

package com.example.vigilante
  • Class
    Description
    AccessibilityActivity
     
    AccessibilityHelper
     
    AccessibilityManager
     
    AddEvent
    This class helps an organizer to add new events
    AdminBrowseImagesActivity
     
    AdminPage
    This class is used to view the AdminPage when admin logs in which is different than other user's homepage
    AllEventsActivity
    This class is called to show all the events available in firebase with category filtering
    AllProfiles
    This class is used to pull all the profiles registered in firebase
    CalendarActivity
     
    CarouselAdapter
     
    Comment
    This class is what creates a comment for a user.
    CommentAdapter
     
    CommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder
     
    CommentAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
     
    EditPosterActivity
     
    Entrant
     
    EntrantAdapter
     
    EntrantMapActivity
     
    Event
    This class is used to create a Event object which is used by other classes such as addEvent and AllEventActivity to grab data
    EventAdapter
    This class is the engine for event class it uses event class to show the user all the events and options
    EventAdapter.EventViewHolder
    caching references to the event card views for efficient recycling
    EventCreatedActivity
     
    EventDetailActivity
    This class allows user to view event by scanning a qr code from their homescreen
    EventHistoryActivity
    This class shows the user their event participation history with color-coded status badges.
    EventHistoryAdapter
    This class is the adapter for showing event history cards in a RecyclerView with color-coded status badges.
    EventHistoryAdapter.HistoryViewHolder
    This class is a ViewHolder that holds the event title, date and status badge views.
    HomePage
    This class shows the home page to our user, it has the option to scan qr goto events or profile page.
    ImageAdapter
     
    ImageAdapter.ImageViewHolder
     
    InviteActivity
     
    LiquidGlassNavBar
     
    LiquidGlassNavBar.OnTabSelectedListener
     
    LotteryInfoActivity
     
    MainActivity
    This is the class which allows us to log in our app once logged it, it remember the device
    NotificationHelper
    This class is a helper for listening to Firebase changes and sending event-related notifications.
    NotificationLogActivity
    Activity for admins to view a log of all notifications stored on Firestore.
    NotificationsActivity
    This class displays the user's notifications from Firestore for lottery results and event updates.
    Profile
    This class is what creates a profile for a user.
    ProfileAdapter
    This class is the engine function for the profiles, it grabs the profiles from firebase and views it to the user
    ProfileAdapter.ProfileViewHolder
    This function holds the profiles in the recylerview and shows it to the user.
    ProfilePage
    This class is for the profile page it shows the user information, sign out button, and if user is organizer add and my events.
    RegisterPage
    This class is the page for the registration page, it take necessary user info to create account and auto signs in.
    TicketGenerator
     
    viewAttendee
    This class helps organizer see different kinds of attendee list for the event they created.
    WaitingListActivity
